Today

January 4, 2026  ·  #blog

Getting the blog muscles going. This is a post for today. I'm curious about writing inside of VSCode. As I type this, I kinda wish I was in Obsidian. However, this would work well for devlopement blogs that could be included with each repo / project. and 11ty would be much better than all that overhead of other site frameworks IMHO.

And, today I got the newmanure.com pointer set. Could this become my main blog?
